positional_bias.note: 0.40 equals the threshold; condition is strictly > 0.40 — PASS. Matches sidecar [1,2,0,3,1].

per_question.correct_text: A number marking how far along one axis the point sits
(0.8, 0.3) — energy=0.8 on x-axis, mood=0.3 on y-axis
A location in taste-space — each coordinate pins one dimension
Alice and Bob are most similar — their coordinates are close, so their points are nearby
The neighbourhood — the set of nearby points corresponding to listeners with similar taste

length_bias.note: All five ratios below 1.20. Cycle-1 violations resolved: correct answers shortened, distractors lengthened to balance. Cycle-1 worst ratio was 1.509 (q2); cycle-2 worst is 1.02 (q5).

objectives_from_corpus: LO1: Explain what it means to say a vector describes a point in space rather than just a list of numbers.
LO2: Map a 2D vector onto a standard x-y coordinate grid and identify the plotted point.
LO3: Describe a 3D vector as a location in a three-axis space using the music-taste example.
LO4: Explain why two users with similar taste vectors are close in taste-space without using any formula.
LO5: Name the key vocabulary — coordinate space, n-dimensional space, neighbourhood — and give plain-language definitions.
LO6: Identify at least one real AI system that exploits this geometric idea to make recommendations.
objective_coverage.note: Q5 dual-maps LO5 and LO6. Stem frames a music streaming platform using taste vectors to find listeners with similar taste (grounding LO6). Correct answer identifies 'neighbourhood' (grounding LO5). Both LOs have match similarity >= 0.7 against sidecar objective_ref text. Cycle-1 LO6 gap resolved.

beginner_fairness_and_scope.note: All stems use only corpus vocabulary. No question requires dot product, cosine similarity, distance formulas, or embedding knowledge. Q5 recommendation-system framing is directly taught in corpus §5.5 and §7.

verdict: Pass — all four bias/coverage checks clean. Length-bias rate 0.00 (cycle-1 rate was 1.00; fixed by shortening correct answers). LO6 now covered via Q5 dual-map (LO5+LO6). Positional max_share 0.40 at threshold, not over. Distractor plausibility absurd_rate 0.00.
